---
title: &TITLE "Yair Litman"
last: Litman
first: Yair
people_group: "pi"
email: "litmany@mpip-mainz.mpg.de"
education:
  - "Dr. rer. nat. (summa cum laude) | Fritz Haber Institute / Freie Universität Berlin | 2020 <br> Licenciate in Chemical Sciences | University of Buenos Aires | 2014"
subtitle: "Group Leader"
description: ""
image: avatar.jpg
page-layout: full
about:
  id: about
  template: trestles
  image-shape: round
  image: avatar.jpg
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:litmany@mpip-mainz.mpg.de
    - text: "{{< ai google-scholar >}} Google Scholar"
      href: https://scholar.google.de/citations?user=TZ9_wnEAAAAJ&hl=en
    - text: "{{< ai orcid >}} ORCID"
      href: https://orcid.org/0000-0002-6890-4052
    - icon: twitter-x
      text: Twitter/X
      href: https://x.com/YairLitman
    - icon: file-earmark-pdf
      text: CV
      href: ../../CVs/Yair_Litman.pdf
---

<hr>

:::{#about}

Yair leads the STREAM Group at the Max Planck Institute for Polymer Research (Department of Molecular Spectroscopy, Prof. Mischa Bonn) and holds a Junior Faculty position at the Max Planck Graduate Center. Previously, he was a Walter Benjamin Research Associate at the University of Cambridge and a postdoctoral researcher at MPIP and MPSD.

## Education
{{< meta education >}}

:::
